summary: Cascading geo dropdowns (Region/Departement/Sous-Prefecture) and auto-propagation from Fiche 1 to Fiche 2 - All 8 test requirements PASSED. Backend APIs (GET/PUT /api/pdc-v2/{id}) correctly save and return geo fields. Frontend cascading dropdowns work correctly with 32+ CI regions. Auto-propagation syncs sous_prefecture, village, campement from Fiche 1 to Fiche 2.
critical_code_review_comments: coteIvoireGeo.js: Contains 32 CI regions with proper departement->sous-prefecture hierarchy
PDCStepperPage.jsx lines 342-348: Cascading SelectField components with proper disabled logic
PDCStepperPage.jsx lines 178-182: PROPAGATION_MAP correctly maps producteur fields to coordonnees_gps
PDCStepperPage.jsx lines 197-209: Auto-propagation logic in updateField function
PDCStepperPage.jsx lines 211-234: Cascade reset logic when region/departement changes
PDCStepperPage.jsx lines 352-357: geo-auto-propagate-info message with data-testid
PDCStepperPage.jsx lines 429-431: fiche2-geo-info message with data-testid
seed_data_creation: Updated PDC 69d97a7ff2a45f9a4e690268 with geo data: Region=Bafing, Departement=Touba, Sous-Prefecture=Touba
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cascading geo dropdowns fully tested and working. PDC ID=69d97a7ff2a45f9a4e690268 has geo data set. Auto-propagation from Fiche 1 to Fiche 2 works correctly for sous_prefecture, village, and campement fields.

features_tested.requirement_1_region_dropdown: PASSED - Fiche 1 displays SelectField for 'Region / Delegation Regionale' with 32+ CI regions (Agneby-Tiassa, Bafing, District Abidjan, etc.)
features_tested.requirement_2_departement_cascade: PASSED - Selecting a region enables Departement dropdown with filtered departements (Bafing -> Touba, Ouaninou)
features_tested.requirement_3_sous_prefecture_cascade: PASSED - Selecting a departement enables Sous-Prefecture dropdown with filtered sous-prefectures (Touba -> Touba, Booko, Koro, Guinteguela)
features_tested.requirement_4_fiche2_sous_prefecture: PASSED - Fiche 2 Coordonnees GPS displays Sous-prefecture dropdown auto-filled from Fiche 1
features_tested.requirement_5_fiche2_auto_rempli_message: PASSED - Message 'Auto-rempli depuis Fiche 1 — modifiable si necessaire' visible in Fiche 2 (data-testid='fiche2-geo-info')
features_tested.requirement_6_fiche1_auto_propagate_mess: PASSED - Message 'Sous-prefecture, village et campement seront auto-remplis dans la Fiche 2' visible when all 3 geo fields filled (data-testid='geo-auto-propagate-info')
features_tested.requirement_7_backend_get: PASSED - GET /api/pdc-v2/{id} returns step1.fiche1.producteur with geo fields (delegation_regionale, departement, sous_prefecture)
features_tested.requirement_8_backend_put: PASSED - PUT /api/pdc-v2/{id}/step1 saves geo fields and returns updated PDC
